title: Star Wars The Clone Wars
description: This mod is a recreation of the clone wars in minecraft
body:
# **Thank you for choosing our mod!**
+ What dose this mod add -
Clone Wars assets mobs weapons and soon veichels

+ Why our mod? -
Monthly updates, discord community and other additions such as voted in features and collabs

+ Other things before you download - N/A


## Future Updates and what to expect:

~~v1.7: B1 Marine, Crab Droid, Spider Droid~~

~~v1.8: More Clone Legions _(Basic units just for looks)_~~

v1.9: ~~BX commando droid~~, ~~AQ-Battle droid~~, ~~drodika~~, ~~Tatical Droid~~, ~~Buzz Droid~~

v1.10: Jedi and sith units, Magna guard (More lightsabers will be added)

v1.11: Revamped Clones, Revamped B2 Droid, Tactical Droid Fix, Droidika Sniper, Revamped Guns (with animations)

v1.12: AAT Tank, AT-TE Walker, AT-TP Walker

v1.13: Vulture Droid, Rebpublic Fighter, Republic Y wing
## GeckoLib is required in newer versions!
![Geko](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/346fbc96d8f2239bae767083a95ddbbbe48f41d4.png)



Revamped Clones, Revamped B2 Droid, Tactical Droid Fix, Droidika Sniper, Revamped Guns (with animations)

3/27/25
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
